name: @xfcfam-examples/02-sql-postgres
description: XF artefact: PostgresDatabaseRepository → Business → Service, end-to-end against a local Postgres.

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && sleep 2 && pnpm db:schema
scripts.db:schema: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U xf -d xfdemo < schema.sql
